jd_text: Company Description Remotely revolutionizes business operations with an innovative, all-in-one platform designed to simplify processes and improve efficiency. Offering tools like a smart task library, flexible operational guides, an efficient ticketing system, live performance tracking, and real-time reporting, Remotely empowers businesses to reach operational excellence. By replacing traditional paper-based processes with advanced digital solutions, Remotely ensures precision, compliance, and cost optimization. With a quick onboarding process and comprehensive training, Remotely helps businesses achieve consistent success and focus on what truly matters. Role Description This is a full-time on-site role based in Riyadh for a Commercial Director. The Commercial Director will lead and oversee the company's commercial strategies and business planning. Responsibilities include managing sales teams, developing business plans, driving revenue growth, and fostering strong client relationships. Additionally, the role involves analyzing market trends, identifying new business opportunities, and ensuring the company meets its financial and growth objectives. Qualifications Strong Analytical Skills to assess market data, monitor performance, and guide strategic decisions Proven expertise in Business Planning and Commercial Management to develop and execute effective strategies Leadership and Team Management skills to inspire and drive multidisciplinary teams towards achieving goals Experience in Sales and business development with a focus on revenue optimization and client relationship management Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing business dynamics Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field; MBA preferred Familiarity with digital tools and platforms for operational efficiency is a plus
